# Neural-LAM

**Graph-based neural weather prediction for Limited Area Modeling.**
Built with PyTorch, PyTorch Lightning, and PyG.
```{admonition} Quick install
:class: tip
pip install neural-lam
```

Neural-LAM provides a flexible framework for training and evaluating
graph-based neural weather prediction models on regional atmospheric data.
It supports multiple graph architectures, custom datastores, and
probabilistic forecasting.
